zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Pauncefort於大約1455年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾諾薩爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Paunceforte47歲，母親Margaret Swynford31歲。她與George de Beaumont Cole-Orton在英國萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1532年在英國格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Pauncefort于大约1455年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾諾薩爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Paunceforte47岁，母亲Margaret Swynford31岁。她与George de Beaumont Cole-Orton在英国萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1532年在英国格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Pauncefort was born about 1455, in Northall, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Paunceforte, was 47 and her mother, Margaret Swynford, was 31. She married George de Beaumont Cole-Orton in Coleorton, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1532, in Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Pauncefort est née environ 1455, à Northall, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Paunceforte, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Margaret Swynford, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé George de Beaumont Cole-Orton à Coleorton, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1532, à Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Pauncefort um 1455 in Northall, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Paunceforte 47 und ihre Mutter Margaret Swynford 31. Sie hat in Coleorton, Leicestershire, England George de Beaumont Cole-Orton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1532 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Pauncefort è nata il circa 1455 nel Northall, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Paunceforte, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Margaret Swynford, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato George de Beaumont Cole-Orton nel Coleorton, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1532, nel Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Pauncefortが約1455年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアノーサルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Paunceforteは47歳，母Margaret Swynfordは31歳であった。イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコーレオルトンでGeorge de Beaumont Cole-Ortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1532年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアサンドハルストで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Pauncefort(이)가 대략 1455년 영국 벅잉함실르 노르솔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Paunceforte(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Swynford(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 영국 레이스스터실르 콜리르턴에서 George de Beaumont Cole-Orton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1532년 영국 그루스스터실르 샌드후르스트에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England: Kettlethorpe, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Pauncefort nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Northall, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Paunceforte, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Swynford, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com George de Beaumont Cole-Orton em Coleorton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1532, em Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Pauncefort родилась около 1455 г. в местности нортолл, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Paunceforte было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Swynford, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George de Beaumont Cole-Orton в местности колеортон, лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1532 г. в местности сэндхурст, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Pauncefort nació aproximadamente 1455, en Northall, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Paunceforte, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Margaret Swynford, tenía 31 años. Se casó con George de Beaumont Cole-Orton en Coleorton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1532, en Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
